title: Elastic (ESTC) Earnings Date and Reports 2026
text: Elastic (ESTC) earnings calendar and upcoming earnings dates. Next Earnings Release: Elastic will release its next earnings report on May 28, 2026. Historical Earnings Performance: The company has consistently beaten earnings expectations over the past several years. Recent Earnings Beats: Q3 FY2026 earnings beat expectations by 12.31%, with revenue beat of 2.65%. Q2 FY2026 showed a strong earnings beat despite slight revenue miss. Q1 FY2026 showed strong performance with 42.86% earnings surprise. Earnings Estimates: Current fiscal year EPS estimates at $2.50-$2.54 (non-GAAP). Revenue estimates for full year at $1.734-$1.736 billion. Guidance has been raised multiple times in 2026 as company executes strongly. Key Metrics to Watch: Revenue growth rate and subscription revenue growth acceleration. Customer additions and expansion metrics, particularly $100k+ ACV customers. Operating margin progression and free cash flow generation. AI adoption penetration and contribution to growth. Analyst Sentiment: 23 analysts covering the stock with a Buy consensus. 35% Strong Buy, 39% Buy, 26% Hold. Price target consensus around $106-107.
